ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Reset To Aug-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
The Court continued the matter to Aug. 6, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to obtain addtional documents to support the petition for name change.
